body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-59900", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-444", "name": "Inconsistent Interpretation of HTTP Requests ('HTTP Request/Response Smuggling')"}], "description": "Netty's HTTP/2-to-HTTP/1.x translation layer (`Http2StreamFrameToHttpObjectCodec` and `InboundHttp2ToHttpAdapter`) fails to deduplicate or validate `Host` headers when an HTTP/2 client supplies both the `:authority` pseudo-header and a literal `host` header in a single HEADERS frame. The translator maps `:authority` to `Host` and separately copies the literal `host` header, producing an `HttpRequest` object containing two `Host` headers with attacker-controlled differing values.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c69g-56f8-xwqj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T21:49:28Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c69g-56f8-xwqj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c69g-56f8-xwqj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-59900"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T21:49:28Z", "references": ["https://github.com/netty/netty/security/advisories/GHSA-c69g-56f8-xwqj", "https://github.com/netty/netty/releases/tag/netty-4.1.136.Final", "https://github.com/netty/netty/releases/tag/netty-4.2.16.Final", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c69g-56f8-xwqj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/netty/netty/security-advisories/GHSA-c69g-56f8-xwqj", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/netty/netty", "summary": "Netty: [codec-http2] Lack of Host Header Deduplication in HTTP/2→HTTP/1.x Translation Leads to Request Routing Bypass", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T21:49:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c69g-56f8-xwqj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.2.16.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty:netty-codec-http2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.2.0.Final, <= 4.2.15.Final"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.136.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty:netty-codec-http2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.1.136.Final"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Netty: [codec-http2] Lack of Host Header Deduplication in HTTP/2→HTTP/1.x Translation Leads to Request Routing Bypass
